title: Plants vs. Zombies Squared
description: This is a pvz mod that allows YOU to experience the world of Plants vs. Zombies in Minecraft!
body:
![Geckolib Required Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ace6e4d56b6b3f8e61f3370fd56146de5b01a55b.png)

## **_Social Media:_**
# **_[Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Gabi_9b)_** ![Youtube Channel Button Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15dcb58f4433c2ffa4576c9887d955c3da0e3ed9.png)
# **_[Additions Group Discord Server](https://discord.gg/8vauFQf9)_** ![Discord Server Button Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18f7047b8814391c82261da789f78f33033c3a10.png)

**This is a pvz mod that allows _YOU_ to experience the world of Plants vs. Zombies in Minecraft!**

![pvz squared logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee274dec5dfcddfebcc7982e697831cc2503c2a0.png)

**Welcome To The 0.1.0 Update! Giddy up Your Lawnmowers and Peashooters because it is going to get Sticky! Hope you Enjoy :)**

**hope you like the mod ;)**

List of current plants:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Peashooter- Shoots one single pea (Has a pretty awesome GUI if you right click it too)

</details>


List of current zombies:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No Zombies Yet, BUT, You can download the previous version, it had zombies but it's not as good as this one :)

</details>



Q- Can I use this on my modpack?

A- Sure! You can freely use this mod on your modpack!

 

Q- Will this mod be updated further?

A- Yes! We are planning on adding so much stuff but we've just started so expect some bugs too!
